title: prunella webbiana
intro: Prunella webbiana, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Prunella webbiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and sore throats. Prunella webbiana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically in the form of salves or creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
